metadata.title: Sayeethan & Prasanciya — Wedding Invitation
metadata.description: Join us in celebrating our wedding on September 6th, 2026 at Palais du Grand Paris, Champigny Sur Marne.

invitation.heading: Wedding Invitation
invitation.body: With the blessings of the Almighty and our elders, we cordially invite you with your family to attend the auspicious wedding ceremony and to bless the newlyweds.
invitation.groomParents:
Mr. K. Ravi &
Mrs. R. Kalamathi
invitation.brideParents:
Mr. S. Rajasegar &
Mrs. R. Amuthalini

countdown.tagline: Counting Down To Our Sacred Union
countdown.quote: "This is the day the Lord has made" — Psalm 118:24

weInviteYou.heading: We Joyfully Invite You All
weInviteYou.body: To join us as we celebrate the beginning of our forever — a union blessed by tradition, faith, and the love of everyone dear to us.
weInviteYou.closing: Your presence would honour us more than any gift.

meetTheCouple.brideQuote: She is grace wrapped in laughter — a light that brightens every room she enters.
meetTheCouple.groomQuote: He is strength softened by kindness — a steady hand and a heart full of devotion.
meetTheCouple.brideParents: Daughter of Mr. S. Rajasegar & Mrs. R. Amuthalini
meetTheCouple.groomParents: Son of Mr. K. Ravi & Mrs. R. Kalamathi

gallery.heading: Two Hearts, One Love
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse of our journey together

saveTheDate.heading: Save the Date
saveTheDate.helper: Opens your device calendar on mobile · Downloads on desktop

rsvp.heading: RSVP
rsvp.dietaryPlaceholder: Share your wishes, blessings, or any notes (optional)
rsvp.errorNotConfigured: RSVP is not configured yet. Please try again later.
rsvp.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
rsvp.errorConnection: Unable to send your RSVP. Please check your connection and try again.
rsvp.successAccept: We are overjoyed that you will be joining us!
rsvp.successDecline: We understand and will miss you on our special day.
rsvp.successFollowUp: Your response has been received. We look forward to celebrating with you.

envelope.upnishadPrimary: நாம் ஒன்றாகக் காக்கப்படுவோம், ஒன்றாக வாழ்வோம், ஒன்றாக வலிமையுடன் வாழ்வோம்
envelope.upnishadGloss: May we move, nourish, and grow in strength together
envelope.bibleGloss: Therefore what God has joined, let no one separate

calendar.title: Sayeethan & Prasanciya — Wedding
calendar.description: Join us as we celebrate our wedding. Muhurtham: 9:00 AM – 11:00 AM. Reception: 4:00 PM.

honorifics.title: About the traditional names
honorifics.intro: Tap the prefix before a name, or Chi. / Sow. below, to learn what they mean.

groom.meaning: Chi. is short for Chiranjeevi (Sanskrit), a traditional blessing meaning "may he live long." It is placed before the groom's name on South Indian wedding invitations. On this invitation, the Tamil form திருநிறைச்செல்வன் is also used — a title for the youngest son's wedding.

bride.meaning: Sow. is short for Sowbhagyavathi (Sanskrit), a blessing wishing the bride a fortunate and blessed married life. On this invitation, the Tamil form திருநிறைச்செல்வி is also used — a title for the youngest daughter's wedding.
